    <h2>{`Initial setup`}</h2>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Set up a 7.0.11.0 development environment.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Set up a v8 development environment.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Install Docker Desktop for `}<a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "https://docs.docker.com/docker-for-windows/install/"
        }}>{`Windows`}</a>{` or `}<a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "https://docs.docker.com/docker-for-mac/install/"
        }}>{`Mac`}</a>{`.`}</li>
    </ol>
    <h2>{`Docker Desktop setup`}</h2>
    <p>{`Once installed, you will need to allow Docker Desktop to access certain paths on the local filesystem. These will be the folders that the tool will work on i.e. your SPM source code folder that will provide the input data, plus an output folder where it will write the modified data.`}</p>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Open Docker Desktop.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Click Settings > Resources > File Sharing.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Share your 7.0.11.0 development environment folder`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Share a temporary folder, e.g. `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`/tmp/upgrade`}</inlineCode>{` or `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`c:\\temp\\upgrade`}</inlineCode></li>
    </ol>
    <img {...{
      "src": "../images/docker-volume-sharing.png",
      "alt": "1. Open Docker Desktop, 2. Click the Settings button then Resources then File Sharing, 3. Add the folder you want to share with the Docker container",
      "title": "Docker volume sharing screenshot"
    }}></img>
    <h2>{`Downloading the tool`}</h2>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Run `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`docker login`}</inlineCode></li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Run `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`docker pull docker.io/ibmcom/spm-ui-upgrade-helper:latest`}</inlineCode></li>
    </ol>
    <h2>{`Running the tool`}</h2>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Download the batch file or shell script:`}
        <ul parentName="li">
          <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`curl -L https://raw.githubusercontent.com/IBM/spm-ui-upgrade-helper/main/spm-ui-upgrade-helper.bat -o spm-ui-upgrade-helper.bat`}</inlineCode>{` (Windows)`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`curl -L https://raw.githubusercontent.com/IBM/spm-ui-upgrade-helper/main/spm-ui-upgrade-helper.sh -o spm-ui-upgrade-helper.sh`}</inlineCode>{` (Linux)`}
            <ul parentName="li">
              <li parentName="ul">{`If using Linux, make the shell script executable with `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`chmod +x spm-ui-upgrade-helper.sh`}</inlineCode></li>
            </ul>
          </li>
        </ul>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Start the tool:`}
        <ul parentName="li">
          <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`spm-ui-upgrade-helper.bat <version> <input folder> <output folder>`}</inlineCode>{` (Windows)`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`./spm-ui-upgrade-helper.sh <version> <input folder> <output folder>`}</inlineCode>{` (Linux)`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul">{`Notes:`}
            <ul parentName="li">
              <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`<version>`}</inlineCode>{` is typically “latest”.`}</li>
              <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`<input folder>`}</inlineCode>{` should be your 7.0.11.0 development environment (set it to the root folder as there are files in both webclient and EJBServer that the tool will touch.)`}</li>
              <li parentName="ul">{`Run `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`chmod -R 777 <output folder>`}</inlineCode>{` so that Docker can interact with the output folder.`}</li>
              <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`<output folder>`}</inlineCode>{` should be a temporary folder e.g. `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`c:\\temp\\upgrade`}</inlineCode>{` or `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`/tmp/upgrade`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
              <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`<output folder>`}</inlineCode>{` will be wiped, so be careful!`}</li>
              <li parentName="ul">{`The input and output folders MUST be absolute paths.`}</li>
            </ul>
          </li>
        </ul>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Open your browser to http://localhost:3000`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Press `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`F1`}</inlineCode>{` or `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`cmd + shift + p`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Type `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Run SPM UI Upgrade Helper`}</inlineCode>{` and click on the shortcut.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Wait a few minutes for the tool to finish.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`The files in `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`<input folder>`}</inlineCode>{` will be scanned and the results placed in `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`<output folder>`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Click the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Source Control: Git`}</inlineCode>{` button on the left sidebar to inspect the changes.`}</li>
    </ol>
    <img {...{
      "src": "../images/upgrade-helper.gif",
      "alt": "1. Press F1, 2. Type \"Run SPM UI Upgrade Helper\", 3. Select the shortcut, 4. Wait for the tool to finish, 5. Click \"Source Control: Git\" to see the output",
      "title": "Running the UI Upgrade Helper tool"
    }}></img>
    <ol {...{
      "start": 9
    }}>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Copy the contents of `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`<output folder>`}</inlineCode>{` into your v8 development environment.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Build and test v8.`}</li>
    </ol>
    <h2>{`Errors`}</h2>
    <p>{`To see the container logs run `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`docker logs spm-ui-upgrade-helper`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <p>{`You can save the logs to a file using e.g. `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`docker logs spm-ui-upgrade-helper > /tmp/logs.txt`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <h2>{`Additional options`}</h2>
    <p>{`In most cases, you can run this tool without modification, assuming that your SPM version is a standard installation.`}</p>
    <p>{`If your installation is non-standard, you might need to update the ignore files to suit your customer environment.`}</p>
    <h3>{`Ignoring files`}</h3>
    <p>{`See the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "customer_ignores"
      }}>{`ignoring files page`}</a>{` for steps to ignore certain files and folders.`}</p>
    <h3>{`Custom configuration`}</h3>
    <p>{`If custom configuration is required, this can be achieved by using a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`.spm-uiuh-config`}</inlineCode>{` file as detailed `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "customer_configuration"
      }}>{`here`}</a>{`.`}</p>
    <h2>{`Troubleshooting`}</h2>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Make sure you are logged in to Docker (run `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`docker login`}</inlineCode>{`)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Make sure folders are shared in Docker Desktop`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Restart Docker Desktop`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Delete `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`<output folder>`}</inlineCode>{` and try again`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Make sure you have run `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`chmod -R 777 <output folder>`}</inlineCode>{` so that Docker can write to it`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Don’t refresh http://localhost:3000/#/home/workspace/output, instead go to http://localhost:3000`}</li>
    </ul>

    </MDXLayout>;
